texto: It wasn't that she lit up, but that everything else seemed to dim. Things he thought were important or bright turned out not to be when she was around, when they were held up against her glow.
explicacao: Citação de L.C. Fiore sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It wasn't that she lit up, but that everything else seemed to dim. Things he thought were importa…” articula reflexao, romantic, everything em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
